restaurants.name: Yank Sing
restaurants.trending_reason: Behind-the-scenes kitchen TikTok hit 695K plays. The 67-year-old Michelin Bib Gourmand institution is having a viral moment — one of few dim sum spots still doing cart service.

restaurants.name: La Taqueria
restaurants.trending_reason: 1.2M plays on a single TikTok calling it 'the best burrito in the US.' Featured in 3 separate viral SF food roundups this week.

restaurants.name: Butter & Crumble
restaurants.trending_reason: Featured in a '24 hours eating in SF' TikTok with 576K plays as 'one of the country's best bakeries.'

restaurants.name: Woodhouse Fish Co.
restaurants.trending_reason: $16 lobster rolls all April for their 16th anniversary. TikTok blew up with 495K plays — 'better take advantage while you can.'

restaurants.name: Bette's
restaurants.trending_reason: Pop-up chicken parm sandwich in FiDi went viral on TikTok (472K plays). 'SF's best chicken parm isn't in an Italian restaurant.'

restaurants.name: Yamo
restaurants.trending_reason: Featured in 2 viral TikToks — a 'support small businesses' video (259K plays) and an 'SF food under $10' roundup. Legendary $6 noodle bowls.

restaurants.name: Original Joe's
restaurants.trending_reason: Classic North Beach institution trending on TikTok (319K plays). Tagged alongside Afghan food — 'can't wait to come back.'

restaurants.name: Ninniku
restaurants.trending_reason: TikTok went viral (241K plays) for their $16 lunch deal — appetizer, ramen, and dessert. 'Let me put you on to one of my favorite lunch deals in SF.'

restaurants.name: Mensho Tokyo
restaurants.trending_reason: 'A Michelin-starred experience for just $20' — TikTok hit 221K plays. Next-level ramen without the fancy price tag.

restaurants.name: Fusion Dumpling SF
restaurants.trending_reason: 'Hidden gem alert' — crab lo mein and dumplings went viral on TikTok (196K plays). A must in SF Chinatown.

restaurants.name: Hamburguesa Bar
restaurants.trending_reason: Just opened 6 weeks ago. $8 smash burgers open til midnight — The Black Label with brisket, truffle butter & mushroom ragout. Already 33 Yelp reviews.

restaurants.name: Paper Son Coffee
restaurants.trending_reason: 4 Instagram posts this week from food bloggers. Drip coffee and Korean salt bread pastries from Tano creating lines out the door.

restaurants.name: Le Marais Bakery
restaurants.trending_reason: French pastries and afternoon vibes in the Castro. Location-tagged Instagram posts with 'Afternoon in the Castro' energy.

restaurants.name: Falasteen SF
restaurants.trending_reason: Brand new opening in Noe Valley getting Instagram buzz. Palestinian cuisine from Samir Salameh — 'truly a man of many talents.'

restaurants.name: Bao Bao Dumpling
restaurants.trending_reason: Featured on Instagram for pan fried pork buns, xiao long bao, and green chives pie. Inner Richmond hidden gem.
